about.intro_part2: at the intersection of design and code. I craft aesthetics down to the millimeter and bring them to life through technology, whether on a screen, a virtual stage, or a physical installation.
about.col1: My entire professional life has been linked to graphic and digital design. It's an old passion—ever since I was a child watching cartoons, I knew exactly what I wanted to do. Today, I turn that imagination into reality through Design, Animation and Visual Effects.
about.col2: In my last role, I worked as a Creative and Technical Director, taking responsibility for all 3D virtual production in the events and advertising sectors, as well as content creation and event planning. My role went far beyond visual execution, it involved designing immersive environments, creating animations and visual effects.
about.col3: I consider myself an eternally curious mind and a chronic self-taught learner, always on the lookout for new technologies. This need to explore led me to test Artificial Intelligence tools, develop applications for various platforms, and dive into electronics. I love getting my hands dirty programming, creating immersive interactive installations that bridge the physical and digital worlds.

footer.text: Developed and Designed by Diogo Santos

p1.title: APDC Stage Design
p1.objective: Design and implement an optimized stage for the Culturgest auditorium, suitable for both the live audience and the online broadcast (streaming) of the APDC annual congress.
p1.description: Using Vectorworks Spotlight, I created a concave ledwall scaled to the amphitheater. The central highlight is an entrance tunnel culminating in a circular cutout on the screen. I integrated two side areas for discussion panels, allowing for dynamic switching during the event. The final design reflects technological innovation and ensures strong visual immersion.

p2.title: Wood Bed Design and Visualization
p2.objective: Design a queen-size plywood bed and nightstands for the brand "Layers", featuring a modern, functional look with an integrated logo.
p2.description: The floating birch and white Formica bed reflects a modern aesthetic, balancing lightness, comfort, and the brand's innovative identity.

p3.title: NOS Stage Design
p3.objective: Design an impactful stage under the "Circus" theme for the NOS Christmas party, focused on bringing together employees from all over the country.
p3.description: The scenography was tailored to the concept with a circular stage, crowned by an animated ledstrip structure (pixel on pixel) representing the NOS "Wheel", which was entirely developed and produced by me. Behind the stage, I installed a recessed ledwall to create a sense of depth and highlight the content I operated live. This project won three Lusophone Creativity Awards: Gold (Corporate Event), Silver (Brand Event), and Bronze (Large-Scale Event). You can watch the promo video HERE.

p4.title: NTT Data Stage Design
p4.objective: Design a stage for an internal NTT Data corporate event, adapted to a hotel ballroom with banquet-style seating for the audience.
p4.description: I designed the stage and the lighting project in complete harmony with the event's visual identity. The final result materialized in high-quality photorealistic 3D images, entirely rendered in Blender software.

p5.title: Toji SPA Visualization
p5.objective: Design and render a private room in a luxury spa (20x20 feet), blending Japanese minimalism with Balinese aesthetics.
p5.description: The space maximizes natural light with polished concrete and wood slats, including a sauna, shower, and lounge. The project delivered 12 renders.

p6.title: B to BEE Brand Design
p6.objective: Create a logo that represents the connection between the corporate sector and producers/beekeepers for an NGO.
p6.description: I developed an abstract and sustainable bee (green/blue) with clean lines, resulting in a versatile and modern identity.

p7.title: Organoleve Label Design
p7.objective: Design the label for a premium weight loss tea in Brazil with a vintage and exclusive aesthetic.
p7.description: I created an organic design with retro influences and vibrant colors, where the layout highlights both the logo and the product's function.

p8.title: Simple Classroom Logo Design
p8.objective: Create a logo for educational software that was simultaneously highly reliable and very accessible/human.
p8.description: I focused on human connection through friendly shapes and welcoming typography. The created icon ensures high brand adaptability across various media.

p9.title: Benzo App Design
p9.objective: Create the UI/UX for "Benzo Buddy", an app focused on supporting benzodiazepine tapering with plans, symptom tracking, and emotional support.
p9.description: I developed a minimalist, safe, and empathetic interface centered around the 3D mascot "Buddy", offering clear and calming navigation for vulnerable users.

p10.title: Cowboy Ducky App Design
p10.objective: Design the UI/UX and character for a tap-to-earn mini-app on Telegram, featuring visual progression across 25 levels.
p10.description: The app includes Light and Dark modes, logo, social media assets, and a TouchDesigner prototype, ensuring fluidity and fun centered around a 3D "chubby duck".

p11.title: Omni App Design
p11.objective: Create "Omni", an AI chatbot app with a mystical theme, featuring image support, co-op mode, and a gamified token store.
p11.description: The user experience combines glassmorphism, 3D mystical elements, and a store that turns transactions into an appealing game-like process.

p12.title: Romanovska Law Website Design
p12.objective: Redesign the homepage of a law firm to increase conversion, highlighting clarity and ease of booking.
p12.description: I implemented an elegant layout supported by photography, icons, and minimalist illustrations that convey trust, finalized with a video prototype.

p13.title: Carla Rocha Interactive Videomapping
p13.objective: Conceive an immersive and interactive dinner for the internal team of the Carla Rocha academy.
p13.description: I designed a 360º visual experience in a rectangular room, combining videomapping with an interactive dining table for 20 people. I was responsible for creating all visual content and programming the system in TouchDesigner, powered by three infrared sensors for motion detection. This project won the APCE Grand Prix in the 'Internal Event' category.

p14.title: Católica Interactive Lights
p14.objective: Create an interactive light installation featuring the "Católica" lettering for the annual diploma award event.
p14.description: I developed a computer vision system that captures the movement of people walking past the letters, generating a beam of white light that follows them in real-time. All interactivity was programmed using TouchDesigner software.

p15.title: Immersive Race Game
p15.objective: Develop an interactive brand activation for a live event of an automotive manufacturer.
p15.description: I created a prototype of an interactive car racing game controlled exclusively by the user's hand movements. The project was based on an advanced motion tracking system, offering an immersive and innovative experience to the audience.

p16.title: APDC Content Production
p16.objective: Produce the introduction film for the APDC annual congress.
p16.description: Besides designing the stage and the audiovisual mockups for this event, I took on the graphic creation of the video content and its full live operation, managing the broadcast through Pixera media servers.

p17.title: Microsoft Content Production
p17.objective: Produce the visual and technical component of an international-scale virtual event for Microsoft.
p17.description: I designed two 3D digital stages and produced the visual content, aligning them with the event's gala aesthetic. Alongside the design, I programmed the entire technical component of the virtual environments and took charge of camera operation and directing during the live broadcast.

p18.title: NTT Data Content Production
p18.objective: Produce the introduction film for the internal NTT Data corporate event.
p18.description: Using advanced motion design techniques and software, I created an energetic and impactful introductory video, designed to immediately capture the audience's attention.
